focus: Slice breakthrough stories, swing slower fix, journey metaphor, forum confession threads

PAIN.quote: I went to the driving range about a month ago...sliced every single one of my drives and could not hit my irons solidly for my life. Went out golfing (18 holes) with my family, either sliced or topped every drive. It was horrible
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix
PAIN.context: Every drive sliced, embarrassing family round

PAIN.quote: I spend so much time researching online how to fix a slice. Then spent weeks trying to fix my out-to-in swing path, fix my head being ahead of the ball at impact, trying to turn over my hands more after impact. Nothing. Still was slicing every drive
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix
PAIN.context: Weeks of research and practice - nothing worked

PAIN.quote: First 5 drives I sliced. I was so frustrated, I just set up over the next ball and took a really nice and slow swing, because I was giving up
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix
PAIN.context: Giving up in frustration led to breakthrough

PAIN.quote: Here are my averages for 14 drives. Nothing I do seems to fix this slice I'm dealing with. Any tips would be great appreciated
PAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

PAIN.quote: My buddy Sterling hits a big ol nasty slice. We were playing in a scramble and my buddy Matt piped a baby draw down the fairway as he's known to do. Buddy Sterling said, and I quote, 'I would do anything to hit driver like that'
PAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice
PAIN.context: Would do ANYTHING except take lessons

PAIN.quote: I said, 'Even take a lesson?' and everyone laughed like it was a joke... He still hasn't taken a lesson and still hits a slice
PAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

PAIN.quote: I had extreme case of bad slice with driver. It was so bad that if I swing as hard as I can without worrying about anything, I could probably send the ball 2 fairways to the right
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

PAIN.quote: I tried many different things. I tried to change my upswing(more vertical), downswing(wrist closing), stance(to left), etc etc
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

HOPE.quote: And that one went straight down the middle of the driving range, about 180 yards. That was the turning point. That's all I had been doing wrong the whole entire time--swinging too hard!
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix

HOPE.quote: I slowed down my swing and now I'm hitting every shot perfectly straight. I'm so happy but I'm shocked it was something as simple as that!
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix

HOPE.quote: I still dont believe that my 5 iron goes 150 straight as an arrow when I swing like an 80 year old woman, it just doesnt seem possible but it works. Pure contact beats out speed with poor contact every single time
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix
HOPE.context: Pure contact > speed with poor contact

HOPE.quote: After my fitting last week, it was very apparent that I was playing with equipment that I had outgrown; changing shafts closed up the face at impact and now I'm sending piss missiles with zero f's given
HOPE.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

HOPE.quote: BOOM. Nearly dead-straight draw shots everywhere. I didn't perfect it yet, but if my shots were 9/10 slice, now its 8/10 straight draw, with 2/10 slice shots. This is a major improvement
HOPE.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

HOPE.quote: After I got used to the different grip, whenever I hit it with slight draw, straight ball flight = Good 10yard gain from my usual driver distance. Those ones... well... oh dear sweet lord. I would say good 40yard gain
HOPE.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: I think what was happening was I was trying to swing so hard that most of my body, including my head, was way in front of the ball at impact--resulting in an open clubface. When I swing slower, I can keep my head behind the ball and get the clubface square at impact
ROOT_CAUSE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix
ROOT_CAUSE.context: Swing too hard = body ahead = open face

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: Your issue is either in your setup, backswing, or transition to downswing... or maybe a problem in all three. Your ability to hit the ball as well as you do indicates that you are compensating for your swing flaws pretty well
ROOT_CAUSE.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: As a veteran slicer, my guess is the combination of (a) an out to in swing and (b) the club face is a bit open compared to the swing path. Both of which send the ball to the right
ROOT_CAUSE.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice
ROOT_CAUSE.context: Out to in + open face = slice

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: I was gripping like a weak grandma and open face-biased grip. I was always told to relax as much as I can, so I guess I relaxed the grip too much
ROOT_CAUSE.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: I don't know anyone that has fixed a slice on their own; I tried... didn't work
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: I had to literally break my swing/stance/grip/alignment down to basics to fix it. Now I fixed it, but it was frustrating. I took it one step at a time, working on one thing and not all at once
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: no one had ever told be to slow down my swing a little. They got all technical and everything...and here I wasn't even doing anything technically wrong, I was just trying to kill it
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: People always told me to fix the swing beforehand. Well, as most of you slice-happy users know, its NOT THAT EASY!
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: Get a DRAW biased / HT(high trajectory, high loft) driver. HUGE difference. HUGGGE difference. Slice was still there. Remember, this is JUST AN AID, not the solution
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.context: Draw bias helps but doesn't solve

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: R7 draw irons' distance isn't that good. Kinda like R7 Draw driver
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: I wouldn't necessarily call the draw driver a swing aid...more like a band aide and those fall off
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: A quick fix that helps me when I am leaving the face open is to either strengthen my grip or go ahead and just rotate the club face closed at address
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.context: Quick fixes = grip or close face at address

VILLAIN.quote: It's not a quick fix; it's a journey and we are all on the same journey... just different points along the path
VILLAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice
VILLAIN.context: Journey metaphor - no quick fix exists

VILLAIN.quote: Not swinging hard has got to be the number one hardest thing for me to do, as well as most people I see play
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix

VILLAIN.quote: Pride gets in the way, and golf ads/golfers make it appear that you should swing hard all the time and its all about distance
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix

VILLAIN.quote: I get in trouble trying to swing way to hard and be a hero on every shot and out drive everyone off the tee
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix

VILLAIN.quote: lessons are cheaper than, say, a new driver
VILLAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice

sources_covered: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice...shocking fix
MyGolfSpy - Please help fix my slice
GolfWRX - Finally fixed my slice with the driver
high_value_themes_identified: Giving up in frustration led to breakthrough
Swing slower = simple fix after complex attempts
Pure contact > speed with poor contact
Would do ANYTHING except take lessons
